title: Built an AI Trading App [Feedback Needed]
author: StandingSock
selftext:
What started as a side hobby has evolved into a legitimate product. I’m an ex-Adobe software engineer, and I originally built this to learn the ropes of AI: specifically agentic design, MCP servers, and how to apply them to stocks, options, and crypto.

**The Product Features:**

* **Autonomous Trading:** Executes via Alpaca (live) or sandbox accounts (paper trading).
* **Agentic Insights:** Uses AI tooling to autonomously manage research and data.
* **MCP Integration:** Works seamlessly with MCP servers like Alpha Vantage and Polygon.
* **Model Support:** Compatible with the latest LLMs, including GLM 4.7, Minimax M2.1, GPT 5+, and DeepSeek v3.2.
* **Natural Language to Action:** Converts prompts into research. (e.g., *"Get a 5-day chart of NVDA with RSI and Bollinger Bands"*) It fetches from TradingView, parses indicators, and analyzes them based on your instructions.
* **Chart Parsing:** Can pull and analyze data from public TradingView share links.
* **Sentiment Analysis:** Fetches news, searches Reddit, and pulls sentiment data from Stocktwits.
* No code or API keys required

I’ve been building, testing, and iterating on this since 2024. While earlier models (like GPT-4o) struggled with hallucinations, the latest frontier models have become shockingly good. I can only imagine where this goes in the next few years.

**How it handles decisions:** Many people assume AI trading is a "black box"—it’s not. You guide the AI with your own strategy or theory, and it acts as your agent to execute that plan. If you tell it to *"Scan* r/stocks *daily, cross-reference with the news, and buy if sentiment is positive,"* that’s exactly what it does. If you want it to maintain a specifically balanced portfolio of stocks, bonds, and crypto, it sticks to that logic.

**The Results:** In terms of returns, I had one specific strategy make $39k in a single month during paper trading. However, I've found that running too frequently or trading in sideways markets usually results in losses. I am currently running it with real money and can post those results in the future.

This isn’t some "vibe-coded" hack job. I’ve poured my soul into the design and architecture of this, and I truly believe it’s going to mature into something amazing.

I’m at the point where I need real-world feedback to see how different strategies perform. It's open for beta testing - 100% free. All you have to do is signup (ignore the pricing plans), send me a DM, and I'll upgrade your account.

comments.author: StandingSock
comments.body: Thanks for reading! If you're intrested in 100% free beta testing, here's the link: [https://stockseas.com/](https://stockseas.com/)
